questions.q: In May 2026, Unfrozen and Hooded Horse announced that which strategy RPG revival sold over 500,000 copies in its first 72 hours of Early Access?
options: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era
questions.correctText: Heroes of Might and Magic: Olden Era

questions.q: According to breaking health reports, a suspected outbreak of what rare rodent-borne disease killed three people on a Netherlands-based cruise ship in the Atlantic?

Scientists recently developed a bioengineered chewing gum containing extracts from which plant to help fight oral cancer by lowering HPV and harmful bacteria?
